flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Phoenix College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $9.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Phoenix College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.1k → $2.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Phoenix College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Phoenix College fell 30% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.6k → $6.8k).
